steps.title: Substitute y = 54 into the second inequality
steps.content:
The point $(x, 54)$ must satisfy both inequalities. The first, $y > 17$, is automatically satisfied since \$54 > 17$.
For the second inequality, substitute $y = 54$ into $4x + y \leq 18$:
$$4x + 54 \leq 18$$

steps.title: Solve for the constraint on x
Check which choice satisfies the constraint
steps.content: We need $x \leq -9$. Checking each choice: \$9 > -9$ (no), \$5 > -9$ (no), $-5 > -9$ (no), but $-9 \leq -9$ (yes). That matches choice D — D is correct.
